info.title: FreightUtils API
info.description: Free freight calculation and reference data APIs. No authentication required. JSON responses. CORS enabled for all origins.

get.description: Calculate loading metres (LDM) for pallets on a vehicle. Supports preset pallet sizes or custom dimensions. Returns utilisation percentage, pallet spaces, and fit warnings.

parameters.name: pallet
parameters.description: Preset pallet type. If omitted, length and width are required.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Pallet length in millimetres. Required if no pallet preset is specified.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Pallet width in millimetres. Required if no pallet preset is specified.

parameters.name: stack
parameters.description: Stack factor (number of pallets that can be stacked). Only relevant when stackable is true.

parameters.name: vehicle_length
parameters.description: Custom vehicle length in metres. Only used when vehicle is 'custom'.

get.description: Calculate cubic metres (CBM), cubic feet, litres, and cubic inches from box dimensions.
Calculate the chargeable weight for air freight shipments by comparing actual gross weight against volumetric weight.

parameters.name: factor
parameters.description: Volumetric divisor factor. Standard air freight is 6000.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Calculation mode: air (default) or sea (W/M at 1 CBM = 1 revenue tonne)

get.description: Calculate how many boxes fit on a pallet, including layers, orientation, volume utilisation, and weight limits.

parameters.name: pmh
parameters.description: Pallet maximum height in centimetres (total including deck).

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.description: Allow box rotation to find best fit.

get.description: Look up ADR dangerous goods data by UN number, name search, or hazard class filter. Provide exactly one search parameter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to find substances by name.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Alias for search. Search term to find substances by name.

get.description: Calculate whether a single dangerous goods item qualifies for ADR 1.1.3.6 transport exemption based on transport category points.

parameters.name: qty
parameters.description: Quantity being transported (kg for solids, litres for liquids).

post.description: Calculate whether multiple dangerous goods items together qualify for ADR 1.1.3.6 transport exemption. Points are summed across all items.

get.description: Search for cargo airlines by name, IATA code, ICAO code, AWB prefix, or country. Provide one search parameter.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: General search term (matches airline name, codes, and country).

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country name to filter airlines by.

get.description: Look up INCOTERMS 2020 rules by code or filter by category. Returns detailed responsibility breakdowns for each term. When called with a specific code, returns a single detailed object. When called without a code, returns all terms.

200.description: INCOTERMS data. Returns a single Incoterm object when queried by code, or a list when browsing.

get.description: Search and browse Harmonized System (HS 2022) commodity codes. Supports text search by product description, exact code lookup with ancestor chain, and section browsing. Covers 6,940 codes across 21 sections and 97 chapters.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on descriptions and HS codes. Min 2 characters.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Exact HS code lookup (2, 4, or 6 digit). Returns full details with ancestor chain.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Browse by section Roman numeral. Returns all chapters in that section.

200.description: HS code data. Response shape varies by query mode.

get.description: Shipping container specifications for all 10 standard ISO container types. Returns dimensions, weights, door openings, and pallet capacity. Optionally calculate how many items of given dimensions fit in a specific container.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Container type slug. Omit to list all containers.

parameters.name: l
parameters.description: Item length in centimetres. Requires type, w, and h for loading calculation.

200.description: Container specifications or loading calculation result.

get.description: Convert between freight-relevant units — weights, volumes, lengths, and freight-specific conversions (CBM to chargeable weight using IATA 6000 divisor, CBM to freight tonnes using W/M rule).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Target unit code. Includes freight-specific targets: chargeable_kg (from cbm only) and freight_tonnes (from cbm only).

post.description: Calculate total CBM, weight, LDM, and chargeable weight for mixed consignments. Supports road, air, and sea modes.

post.summary: UK import duty and VAT estimator
post.description: Estimate UK import duty and VAT using live GOV.UK Trade Tariff data.

get.description: Search 116,000+ UN/LOCODE entries by name, code, country, or function type.
Look up air freight ULD specifications. 15 types including AKE (LD3), PMC, temperature-controlled containers. Returns dimensions, weights, volume, aircraft compatibility.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: ULD code or slug (e.g. AKE, PMC). Omit to list all.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: container, pallet, or special.

parameters.name: deck
parameters.description: Filter by deck position: lower or main.

get.description: Look up road freight vehicle and trailer specifications. 17 types covering articulated trailers, rigid trucks, and vans. Returns dimensions, payload limits, pallet capacity.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Vehicle slug (e.g. standard-curtainsider). Omit to list all.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: articulated, rigid, or van.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Filter by region: EU or US.

post.description: Check whether dangerous goods items qualify for ADR Limited Quantity (Chapter 3.4) or Excepted Quantity (Chapter 3.5) concessions. Returns per-item pass/fail against ADR Table A limits.

mode.description: Check mode — 'lq' for Limited Quantity (Ch 3.4) or 'eq' for Excepted Quantity (Ch 3.5)

inner_packaging_qty.description: Number of inner packagings per outer (EQ mode only)

200.description: LQ/EQ check result with per-item status.

405.description: Use POST with a JSON body.

post.description: Chains CBM, chargeable weight, LDM, ADR compliance, and UK duty estimation into one response. The flagship composite endpoint.

available.description: Total pallet spaces available on the vehicle.

length_mm.description: Pallet length in mm as interpreted.

width_mm.description: Pallet width in mm as interpreted.

total_weight_kg.description: Total weight of all pallets in kg, or null if weight not provided.

fits.description: Whether the load fits on the selected vehicle.

warnings.description: Any warnings about the load (e.g. overweight, overhang).

total_cbm.description: Total cubic metres for all pieces.

total_volume_m3.description: Total volume in cubic metres (same as total_cbm).

chargeable_weight_kg.description: The chargeable weight (higher of actual vs volumetric).

basis.description: Whether the chargeable weight is based on 'actual' gross weight or 'volumetric' weight.

volumetric_weight_per_piece_kg.description: Volumetric weight per piece in kg.

boxes_per_layer.description: Number of boxes fitting in a single layer.

layers.description: Number of layers that fit within the height constraint.

total_boxes.description: Total number of boxes fitting on the pallet.

orientation.description: Whether boxes were rotated for best fit.

boxes_per_row.description: Number of boxes per row along the pallet length.

boxes_per_col.description: Number of boxes per column along the pallet width.

usable_height_cm.description: Usable stacking height after subtracting deck height.

total_box_volume_cbm.description: Total volume of all boxes in CBM.

weight_limited.description: Whether the result was limited by weight rather than space.

total_weight_kg.description: Total weight of all boxes, or null if box weight not provided.

remaining_weight_capacity_kg.description: Remaining weight capacity, or null if not applicable.

un_number.description: UN number identifying the dangerous goods.

proper_shipping_name.example: MOTOR SPIRIT or GASOLINE or PETROL

variant_index.description: Index of this variant (0-based) when a UN number has multiple entries.

variant_count.description: Total number of variants for this UN number.

items.description: Array of dangerous goods items to calculate.

proper_shipping_name.example: MOTOR SPIRIT or GASOLINE or PETROL

multiplier.description: Points multiplier for this transport category.

exempt.description: Whether the shipment qualifies for 1.1.3.6 exemption.

has_category_zero.description: Whether any item is transport category 0 (never exempt).

has_quantity_exceedance.description: Whether any single item exceeds its maximum quantity per transport unit.

has_cargo.description: Whether the airline operates cargo services.

verified.description: Whether the airline data has been verified.

seller_responsibility.description: What the seller is responsible for.

buyer_responsibility.description: What the buyer is responsible for.

risk_transfer.description: Point at which risk transfers from seller to buyer.

cost_transfer.description: Point at which cost responsibility transfers.

best_for.description: Scenarios this term is best suited for.

watch_out.description: Common pitfalls or things to be aware of.

euroPallets.description: Number of EUR pallets (1200x800mm) that fit.

gmaPallets.description: Number of GMA pallets (48x40in) that fit.

within_payload.description: Whether total weight is within payload limit.

description.example: Coffee, whether or not roasted or decaffeinated

parent.description: Parent code or TOTAL for chapters.
